text.en: Jacob Devlin and collaborators introduced BERT as a bidirectional transformer language model pre-trained with masked language modeling and next-sentence prediction. It made pre-training then fine-tuning a dominant recipe for natural language understanding.
text.zh: 雅各布·德夫林及合作者提出 BERT，这是一种用掩码语言建模和下一句预测预训练的双向 Transformer 语言模型。它让“先预训练、再微调”成为自然语言理解的主流配方。

text.en: Pre-training of deep bidirectional transformers for language understanding
text.zh: 用于语言理解的深度双向 Transformer 预训练
